creator: grembo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 232736
Script to trigger epair panic

This panic looks very similar to bug #234985 and can be triggered easily using the attached crash_epair.sh script.

Tested on:
- 13.0-RELEASE-p8
- 13.1-BETA1
- 13.1-BETA2

If it helps, I could create a separate PR for 13.0 (as epair changed a lot, crashdumps differ), but for know I would like to keep the discussion in one place.
